summary: Full Unsupervised Learning System Testing Complete. All 15 features to test PASSED. The new unsupervised learning system runs K-Means, Hierarchical, DBSCAN, GMM clustering + PCA, t-SNE dimensionality reduction + Isolation Forest, LOF anomaly detection when 'No target (Unsupervised Learning)' is selected.

issues: AnimatePresence warning: 'You're attempting to animate multiple children within AnimatePresence, but its mode is set to wait'. This is a minor animation warning but doesn't affect functionality.
validateDOMNesting warning: div cannot appear as a descendant of p. Minor HTML structure issue in Badge component.

passed_tests: TEST 1: PASSED - Load Loan Approval dataset (20 rows), select 'No target (Unsupervised Learning)' from target dropdown, click 'Run Unsupervised Analysis' - results appear after ~0.02s
TEST 2: PASSED - Preprocessing Summary shows: Dataset Size (20 rows), Numeric Features (5), Missing Values Filled (0), Scaling Applied (Standardization z-score)

TEST 3: PASSED - Algorithm Leaderboard shows 4 algorithms (DBSCAN #1 Best, Hierarchical #2, K-Means #3, Gaussian Mixture #4) with Silhouette, Davies-Bouldin, Calinski-Harabasz scores and runtime. Best algorithm (DBSCAN) highlighted with 'Best' badge

TEST 4: PASSED - Best Model Summary shows 4 MetricCards: Silhouette Score (0.638 Fair), Davies-Bouldin (0.423), Calinski-Harabasz (46.1), Clusters Found (2). Color-coded borders and 'Fair' quality label present
TEST 5: PASSED - PCA Cluster Scatter Plot renders with PC1/PC2 axes showing variance explained percentages, colored clusters (blue=Cluster 0, red=Cluster 1) and legend
TEST 6: PASSED - t-SNE Visualization renders for small dataset (20 rows) showing non-linear projection with colored clusters and legend
TEST 7: PASSED - Cluster Distribution Bar Chart shows point counts per cluster (Cluster 0 ~12-13 points, Cluster 1 ~7-8 points)
TEST 8: PASSED - Elbow Method Chart shows inertia vs K (K=2 to 10) with description 'Inertia decreases as K increases. The elbow point suggests the optimal number of clusters'
TEST 9: PASSED - Silhouette Score Chart shows silhouette vs K with description 'Higher silhouette = better-defined clusters. The peak indicates the optimal K'
TEST 10: PASSED - Anomaly Detection chart shows normal (blue) and anomaly (red) points. Summary: 'Isolation Forest detected 2 anomalies (10.0% of data). LOF detected 2 outliers.'
TEST 11: PASSED - Cluster Profile Chart shows feature averages per cluster (Cluster 0, Cluster 1, Overall) as grouped bar chart for all 5 features

TEST 12: PASSED - Cluster Insights panel shows interpretation cards for each cluster with size, interpretation text, and Key Distinguishing Features with deviation percentages (e.g., 'approved: 1.0 (higher, 54% from avg)')

TEST 13: PASSED - Terminology section has all 15 term cards: K-Means, Hierarchical Clustering, DBSCAN, Gaussian Mixture Model, Cluster, Centroid, Density-Based Clustering, Silhouette Score, Davies-Bouldin Index, Calinski-Harabasz Score, PCA, t-SNE, Anomaly Detection, Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor

TEST 14: PASSED - Cluster prediction: Filled form (age=35, income=80000, credit_score=720, loan_amount=25000, approved=1), clicked 'Predict Cluster'. Result shows: Assigned Cluster (Cluster 1 in red), Distance to centroid (1.3267), Interpretation text, Input Summary badges
TEST 15: PASSED - Supervised learning still works: Selected 'approved' as target, trained model. Results show Training Complete with Decision Tree achieving 100% accuracy on classification task
critical_code_review_comments: unsupervisedML.js implements all algorithms correctly: prepareUnsupervisedData (preprocessing), runKMeans, runHierarchical, runDBSCAN, runGMM, runPCA, runTSNE, runIsolationForest, runLOF, silhouetteScore, daviesBouldinIndex, calinskiHarabaszScore, findOptimalK, interpretClusters, predictCluster, runUnsupervisedPipeline
App.js lines 768-771: State variables correctly initialized (unsupervisedResult, isRunningUnsupervised, clusterPredFormData, clusterPredResult)
App.js lines 991-1016: handleRunUnsupervised and handleClusterPredict functions correctly implement the analysis and prediction workflows
App.js lines 1018-1034: UNSUPERVISED_TERMS constant defines all 15 terminology items

App.js lines 1561-1821: Comprehensive UI rendering for all unsupervised results including preprocessing summary (data-testid='unsupervised-results'), algorithm leaderboard (data-testid='algorithm-leaderboard'), best model summary (data-testid='best-model-summary'), PCA chart (data-testid='pca-chart'), t-SNE chart (data-testid='tsne-chart'), cluster distribution (data-testid='cluster-distribution-chart'), elbow chart (data-testid='elbow-chart'), silhouette chart (data-testid='silhouette-chart'), anomaly chart (data-testid='anomaly-chart'), cluster profile (data-testid='cluster-profile-chart'), cluster insights (data-testid='cluster-insights'), terminology (data-testid='terminology-section'), cluster prediction (data-testid='cluster-prediction')
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Used sample dataset: Loan Approval (binary classification - 20 rows, 5 columns: age, income, credit_score, loan_amount, approved)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Unsupervised Learning System verified. Key data-testids for testing: 'target-column-select' (select __none__ for unsupervised), 'run-unsupervised-btn', 'unsupervised-results', 'algorithm-leaderboard', 'best-model-summary', 'pca-chart', 'tsne-chart', 'cluster-distribution-chart', 'elbow-chart', 'silhouette-chart', 'anomaly-chart', 'cluster-profile-chart', 'cluster-insights', 'cluster-insight-{n}', 'terminology-section', 'term-{key}', 'cluster-prediction', 'cluster-pred-input-{col}', 'predict-cluster-btn', 'cluster-pred-result'. Supervised learning continues to work with 'start-training-btn'. Minor console warnings (AnimatePresence, validateDOMNesting) but no functional issues.
